name: Google Drive Sync
tagline: Effortlessly synchronize your chats and settings with Google Drive.

actions.connectDescription: Connect Google Drive so this device can sync chats and settings.
actions.reconnectDescription: Your Google session has expired. Sign in again to resume syncing.
actions.createDescription: Create a new Google Drive file from the current local state and make it the sync target.
actions.pullTitle: Load the selected Google Drive file into this device
actions.pullDescription: This replaces the current local chats and settings with the selected cloud file, then continues syncing with that file.
actions.pushTitle: Force overwrite the selected Google Drive file with this device's local data
actions.pushDescription: Use this when the local state is the source of truth and you want to replace the cloud copy immediately.
actions.disconnectDescription: This only stops syncing and signs out of Google for this app. Your local chats remain on this device, and your Google Drive files are not deleted or cleared.

notice: Note: Your session will be automatically refreshed while your Google account is active. You may need to re-login if your Google session expires. To avoid your cloud data being overwritten, do not use Weavelet Canvas on more than one device at the same time.
privacy: Your privacy is important to us. To protect it, Weavelet Canvas only requests non-sensitive access, which means it can only create, view, and manage its own files and folders.

toast.pull: Loaded cloud data into this device.
toast.push: Cloud file overwritten with local data.

status.idleAwaitingChoice: Auto-sync is waiting for you to choose the sync direction.
status.idleDisconnected: Google Drive Sync is not connected.
